Issues: The image is extremely simplistic, consisting only of a basic silhouette of palm trees and a sun against a solid background. While this is legally fine, it offers very low commercial appeal for selling as a standalone piece of art or a high-value asset.
The lack of complexity, unique composition, and advanced technique limits its marketability. It is a very generic background design.

To increase its sales viability, the image would need to be presented with higher artistic detail, a unique aesthetic, or integrated into a more complex scene, rather than existing as a simple outline.
As a simple line drawing, it is highly susceptible to being copied or easily replicated by others without significant added value.
